  1. Home
  2. rule
  3. Europe
  4. Switzerland

Switzerland

How to Distinguish

  • The domain is .ch
  • camera position low
  • What is the color of the bollard?white with black lines(by Geotips )
  • west of switzerlandFrancewords, north and center areGermanylanguage, south isItalyword (by supercat6_9 )
  • The license plate is distinctive, but the mosaic is strong and difficult to understand.
  • crosswalk sign 7 pieces
  • There is a black and white cylindrical bollard with a round head.
  • The fire hydrant is gray with a red top.

Signs you can find

Representative Companies

    with switzerlandliechtensteinis the camera position low.The bollard feels somehow big.

    Comparison of Google Car in Switzerland and Finland.

    crosswalk sign 7 pieces The crosswalk is yellow.

    liechtensteinhave many things in common, including crosswalks.

    Signs are often surrounded by pipes.Also, the word “limite générale” below is French, so you can imagine it’s from France.

    Cylindrical bollards with round heads are from Switzerland.liechtensteinIt is rarely seen outside of.

    The license plate is distinctive, but the mosaic is strong and difficult to understand.Most cars don’t have blue lines and look white..

    By Roland zh - own work, CC BY-SA 3.0, Link

    By Krokodyl - own work, CC BY 3.0, Link

    The fire hydrant is distinctive.There are variations in color.

    Houses with wooden triangular roofs that are common in the Alps(References local).

    There are variations in shape, including round ones, angular ones, and diagonally cut ones.

    Narrow down state/region

    • west of switzerlandFrancewords, north and center areGermanylanguage, south isItalyword (by supercat6_9 )
      • Limit generale：Franceword
      • GENERELL:Germanyword
      • Limit general:Italyword
      • Limita generala: Romansh
    • Although you don't see it often, you can tell the area by looking at the area code of a phone number.Below is the approximate range.
      • 08X~09X and 071: East
      • 05X~06X: North
      • 03X~04X: Central part
      • 02X: West
    • Are there any flowers that grow at high altitudes?(References Introduction page for \)

      Orange is German, green is French, and purple is Italian.


      By Marco Zanoli, CC BY-SA 4.0, Link

      Please note that 072 to 079 are used on mobile phones, etc. (Example in the city)①).

      By Maximilian Dörrbecker (Chumwa) - Own work using: Switzerland_location_map.svg, CC BY-SA 2.5, Link

      Description of representative companies

      Company name code explanation settlement of accounts Dividend history
      Nestle - It is a food and beverage processing conglomerate and the world's largest food company in terms of sales and profits.Although not listed on the New York Stock Exchange, it is often included in European ETFs and investment trusts.(References SBI European High Dividend Stock Dividend Fund (Quarterly Settlement Type) Monthly Report). -
      Chubb NASDAQ One of the world's largest non-life insurance companies. Dividend History
      GARMIN NASDAQ It is the largest manufacturer of GNSS receivers, and develops automobiles, aviation-related equipment, and wearable equipment that use GPS and other technologies. Dividend History
      sound NASDAQ A major sportswear manufacturer with running shoes as its representative. Dividend History
      Logitech NASDAQ A major computer peripheral equipment manufacturer.In Japan, it is known as Logitech.By the way, personallyErgo series (link)I am using it and highly recommend it.I've been using it for over 3 years for work and private purposes, and it hasn't broken at all, and the trackball has little resistance so my fingers don't hurt. Dividend History
